description: Handcrafted routing eval set — queries labeled with the path the LangGraph agent (Phase 8) should take, given the ACTUAL Phase 7 tools.
notes: Five routing paths: 'retrieve' (answerable from the indexed docs corpus), 'get_package_version' (current PyPI version of a package — corpus is frozen so it can't answer), 'get_corpus_status' (meta questions about our own knowledge: freshness, pinned commit, coverage of a topic), 'fetch_live_doc' (need current/new/out-of-scope doc CONTENT the frozen corpus lacks), and 'clarify' (too ambiguous to answer without a follow-up).
Superseded the old retrieve/tool/clarify set: the synthetic 'ticket' tool was removed, and 'tool' is now three distinct tools the router must disambiguate.
Multi-intent queries list multiple correct paths; the Jaccard metric in eval/metrics.py scores predicted-vs-expected path sets.

Routing distinction cheat-sheet: 'latest VERSION of a package' -> get_package_version; 'how fresh / what commit / do you have docs on X' (about US) -> get_corpus_status; 'fetch/pull the current or newly-added doc page' (the CONTENT) -> fetch_live_doc; answerable from what we indexed -> retrieve.
Categories are informational — not used by the scorer.
This set is scored end-to-end in Phase 8 once the agent's router node exists.

queries.query: How do I use InMemorySaver?
What is a subagent in LangChain?
How do I stream tokens from a LangGraph agent?
How do I create an agent with tools using create_agent?
How does runtime context work inside a tool?
Give me the docs on middleware.
What's the latest version of langgraph on PyPI?
Is langchain-core up to date? What's its newest release?
Which version of langchain was released most recently?
How current are your docs, and what commit are they pinned to?
Do you have any documentation on multi-agent systems?
How many docs do you have and what products do they cover?
Fetch the current LangGraph Studio setup guide from the latest docs.
Pull the up-to-date deployment guide straight from the GitHub docs.
Is there a docs page for a feature added after your snapshot? Show it.
I need the current docs for the OpenAI provider integration page.
Can you help me fix this?
What should I use?
help
It's broken.

Are your docs current? If not, fetch me the newest streaming guide.
